channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. airlines warn over pause in TSA PreCheck and Global Entry programs amid DHS shutdown
item.description: The halt in âthe programs run by the Department of Homeland Security will begin from 6 a.m. ET Sunday, after the partial shutdown began last week.

item.title: Armed man killed by authorities trying to enter Trump Mar-a-Lago club
item.description: President Donald Trump, who narrowly avoided being assassinated in 2024, was not at Mar-a-Lago when the man was killed.

item.title: Trump demands Netflix fire Susan Rice as DOJ probes Warner deal
item.description: Rice argued during a podcast last week that "it is not going to end well" for corporations, news organizations, and law firms that "bent the knee" to ...

item.title: Trump raises global tariff to 15% in latest response to Supreme Court ruling
Could these 6 non-AI chip stocks be the next leg of the AI boom?
Why Nvidia is âhighly motivatedâ to keep investing in OpenAI
Trump approves disaster assistance to D.C. to help with sewage spill into Potomac River
item.description: FEMA announced Trump's approval, allowing the agency to provide resources to help with the response to the Jan. 19 spill after a pipeline ruptured.

item.title: Supreme Court tariff ruling has economists even more stressed over the U.S. debt
JPMorgan concedes it closed Trump's accounts after Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol
item.description: Trump sued JPMorgan Chase for $5 billion, alleging that his accounts were closed for political reasons, disrupting his business operations.

item.title: Asset managers' stocks fell on private-credit fears. Whatâs worrying investors.
